    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "10, ['Providing destination recommendations for Lisbon, Athens, and Barcelona with estimated total costs', 'Listing available activities such as rock climbing and scuba diving with prices', 'Providing flight options with airline category, class, and prices', 'Providing accommodation options with property name, star rating, price, and amenities', 'Offering gluten-free dining options near each hotel with estimated costs', 'Summarizing total estimated package cost and budget compliance', 'Providing availability for travel dates (e.g., July 1, 2024, 5-day trip)', 'Offering alternative destination options fitting user’s criteria', 'Providing booking confirmation summary and status before finalization', 'Requesting confirmation of dietary requirements (gluten-free) as part of information_requests fields']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>
